name: Special Metals
description_short: Special Metals is a global manufacturer of high-performance nickel and cobalt alloys for aerospace, oil & gas, power generation, and industrial applications—not a consumer finance company.
description_long:
Special Metals Corporation is the world's leading inventor, developer, and producer of high-nickel and cobalt alloys, with a corporate history spanning over 170 years. The company traces its origins to Henry Wiggin & Company, founded in 1835, and evolved through key acquisitions including Huntington Alloys (founded 1922) and Inco Alloys International Inc. (acquired 1998). Special Metals is currently owned by Precision Castparts Corp., a global industrial conglomerate operating in more than a dozen countries. The company has invented over 80 percent of the world's nickel alloys, including iconic brands like INCONEL®, INCOLOY®, NIMONIC®, MONEL®, and UDIMET®.

Special Metals serves mission-critical industrial sectors by supplying engineered alloy solutions designed for extreme conditions. Their primary markets include aerospace (high-performance aircraft components), oil and gas (onshore/offshore equipment and deep-sea applications), power generation (coal-fired, natural gas, and nuclear facilities), chemical processing (corrosion-resistant petrochemical equipment), pollution and waste management, and general industrial applications. Beyond raw material production, the company offers value-added services including chemical analysis, mechanical and physical testing, turnkey mill processing capacity, and specialty production programs.

What distinguishes Special Metals is their unmatched metallurgical expertise and innovation track record spanning generations. The company developed NIMONIC® alloys during World War II specifically for gas turbine engines, demonstrating deep technical capability in solving the world's toughest engineering challenges. Their proprietary alloy compositions are engineered for demanding specifications—high-pressure, high-temperature, and corrosive environments where failure is not an option. The breadth of their product line and their role in industries ranging from commercial aviation to deep-sea oil extraction reflects their market position as an irreplaceable supplier.

However, Special Metals is fundamentally a B2B industrial manufacturer, not a consumer finance provider. The company was incorrectly categorized as a payday alternative lender, which is a complete misclassification. This is an industrial supply and manufacturing company with no consumer lending products, credit offerings, or personal finance services. Consumers seeking financial assistance would find no relevant services here.
services: High-nickel and cobalt alloy manufacturing and supply
IncoTest™ independent contract analysis and testing programs
Turnkey mill processing capacity (short or long-term)
Pilot Processing Center for faster lead times and tailored chemistry
Specialty metal management and optimization services
pros: Over 170 years of metallurgical innovation and proven expertise in extreme engineering challenges
Invented 80% of nickel alloys, including proprietary brands (INCONEL®, INCOLOY®, NIMONIC®) trusted globally
Serves mission-critical industries (aerospace, deep-sea oil, nuclear power) where reliability is non-negotiable
Offers turnkey value-added services beyond materials: testing, analysis, pilot processing, and conversion services
Owned by Precision Castparts Corp., a global industrial conglomerate providing financial stability and resources
Specialized alloy compositions (e.g., INCOLOY® 945X®) engineered specifically for maximum uptime in extreme environments
IncoTest™ independent testing and confidential contract analysis programs available to customers
cons: Not a consumer finance company—offers zero personal lending, credit, or financial services
B2B industrial supplier with no retail consumer products or services
Serves only large-scale industrial and commercial customers; not accessible to individual consumers
best_for: Industrial manufacturing companies requiring specialized alloys
Aerospace and defense contractors needing high-performance nickel alloys
Oil and gas operators requiring deep-sea and extreme-environment materials
diagnosis: Special Metals is a B2B industrial manufacturer of specialized alloys—not a consumer finance company. The payday-alternatives categorization is completely inaccurate and appears to be a database error. This company has no relevance to consumers seeking financial services, credit, loans, or cash advances.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
